error.network: Could not reach the server. Check your network.

home.joinRoomSub: Enter a room code to join

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to start translating
login.noAccount: No account needed — Google sign-in creates one automatically.
login.terms: By signing in you agree to our terms of service. Your data is only used to provide the translation service.

error.oauth_failed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
error.google_not_configured: Google sign-in is not configured on this server.
error.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.

onboarding.title: Almost there!
onboarding.subtitle: Set up your profile in a few seconds

nickname.label: What should we call you?
nickname.hint: This shows to other participants. It doesn't need to be unique.

motherLang.label: Your native language
motherLang.hint: This is the language you speak. Rooms you create will default to this.

targetLang.label: Preferred translation language
targetLang.hint: When others speak, you'll see translations in this language by default.
targetLang.sameWarning: ⚠ This is the same as your native language. You can change it.

mode.normalSub: Share a code, each person joins with their language
mode.soloSub: Two languages, one device — flip to switch speaker

fields.guestLanguageHint: Pre-fills the language picker when someone joins with your code. They can still change it.

info.soloBody: A big toggle lets you switch who is speaking. Tap your language side, then speak or type. The translation appears instantly. No sharing needed — it's just the two of you on one device.
info.normalBody: Share the room code with others. Each person selects their language. Messages are translated live — everyone reads in their own language.

errors.notFound: Room not found. Check the code.
